pi_items.source: Task description line 1 and task.json metadata match perfectly
Task description and metadata match; web search confirms no real business by this name exists with this bank account
Task description and metadata match; web search (Payload Docs, Bugster, etc.) confirms 12345678 is a canonical test/dummy bank account number used for testing payment systems
Task description and metadata match; generic bank name with no specific location or routing number
Task description and metadata match; format is correct for UK sort codes (01 = NatWest), but specific code 01-02-03 is not confirmed as a real active bank sort code in official directories

Task description and metadata match; web search (IBAN validators) confirms U.S. banks do NOT use IBAN standard (they use routing numbers and account numbers). This is a synthetic/test IBAN that does not conform to real banking practice

Task description and metadata match; web search (Wise, bank-codes.com) shows FNBKUS33 does not match any real SWIFT/BIC code. Real codes are NFBKUS33XXX (Capital One) or FNBPUS33XXX (First National Bank of Pennsylvania). This is synthetic/test
Task description line 2 and metadata match perfectly
Task description contains both keywords in the Check Payments instructions section; metadata array matches expected verification keywords

privileged_info_summary: This WooCommerce payment gateway configuration task uses entirely synthetic test data with no real banking information. All account details are fake: the account number '12345678' is a canonical test value used in payment system testing, the IBAN 'US64FNBK12345678901234' is invalid (U.S. banks do not use IBANs), the BIC code 'FNBKUS33' does not match any real SWIFT code, and 'Artisan Pottery Co' is a fictional business name. The sort code '01-02-03' follows correct UK formatting but is not confirmed as a real active bank code. All metadata values correctly match the task description and are used for testing agent interaction with WooCommerce payment settings UI. No real payment data or customer information is involved.
